positive: Retro synthwave illustration of a palm tree silhouetted against a dramatic neon sunset. Vaporwave aesthetic, gradients of magenta, cyan, and deep purple. Geometric patterns, 80s grid lines, highly stylized, vector art, perfect for merchandise.
